message:
feat(channel,runtime): add lock-free MPSC spike and seqlock EBR spike, platform headers

Add lock-free MPSC channel spike implementation and seqlock with
epoch-based reclamation spike in runtime. Include new platform
abstraction headers. Update beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
